intro: Name the era! A fast 4-choice World History quiz that connects the timeline.
description:
“What era is this?” Test your World History instincts with quick, bite-size questions about events, people, culture, wars, and inventions. 

Choose the correct era from four options and start seeing how history links together—from the ancient world to the modern age.

Missed a question? Review and try again to strengthen your weak spots. 

Perfect for short study sessions, daily practice, and anyone who wants a clear, enjoyable refresher on World History.
